free_text: Experimental determination of neutron spectra produced
by bombarding thick targets:  deutrons (100 MeV/u) on
Institute of physics and nuclear engineering
Berillium target was 10.5 cm long and 3 mm diameter.
- By compiler.  Experimental data are presented as
smooth curve. Data points were read in suitable points
